message.content:
I'll describe this construction company website in meticulous detail to help you recreate it exactly:

## Overall Layout & Structure
- Full-width, single-page layout with a dark color scheme
- Background: Dark gray/black gradient with a partial image of a modern building (glass/metal facade) visible on the right side
- Content area: Left-aligned with significant white space

## Header Section
- **Logo Area** (top-left):
  - Blue square icon (approximately 30x30px) with white text "N" inside
  - Next to it: "NOW & ALWAYS" in bold white uppercase letters
  - Below: "CONSTRUCTION" in smaller white uppercase letters

- **Navigation Menu** (top-center):
  - Five menu items in uppercase, light gray text:
    - HOME
    - ABOUT
    - SERVICES
    - PROJECTS
    - CONTACT
  - Even spacing between items

- **Call to Action Button** (top-right):
  - Blue rectangular button with white text "CALL NOW"
  - White phone icon (📞) to the left of text
  - Slightly rounded corners

## Main Content Area
- **Company Name** (below header):
  - "NOW AND ALWAYS (PTY) LTD" in blue uppercase letters
  - Smaller font size than main heading

- **Main Heading**:
  - "COMPREHENSIVE CONSTRUCTION & MAINTENANCE SOLUTIONS"
  - Very large, bold white text
  - Two lines: "COMPREHENSIVE CONSTRUCTION" on first line, "& MAINTENANCE SOLUTIONS" on second line

- **Subheading**:
  - "High-quality services for projects of any scale, nationwide. Trusted by clients across South Africa for over 5 years."
  - Regular white text, smaller than heading

- **Action Buttons** (three buttons in a row):
  1. **GET A FREE QUOTE**:
     - Blue background, white text
     - White right arrow icon (→) at the end
     - Rounded corners
  2. **CALL US**:
     - White background, black text
     - Black phone icon (📞) to the left of text
     - Border around button
     - Rounded corners
  3. **WHATSAPP**:
     - White background, black text
     - Black WhatsApp icon (💬) to the left of text
     - Border around button
     - Rounded corners

## Footer/Notification Bar
- Dark gray/black bar at bottom with:
  - Green circular loading icon (⚪) on left
  - White text: "This is the frontend only preview. Please explore the app while we are Spinning up Servers in the background."
  - "Minimize" button on right (gray background, white text)
  - "with Emergent" text in white on far right

## Color Scheme
- Primary: Blue (#2563EB or similar)
- Background: Dark gray/black gradient
- Text: White for headings, light gray for navigation, black for button text
- Button styles: Blue for primary actions, white with borders for secondary actions

## Typography
- Sans-serif font throughout (likely a modern web font like Arial, Helvetica, or similar)
- Hierarchy: Large bold headings, regular body text, uppercase for branding and navigation

This detailed description should allow you to recreate the website with pixel-perfect accuracy.
